MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Craig H. Marcus, Esq., GLASER WEIL FINK HOWARD JORDAN & SHAPIRO LLP, 310-556-7891, cmarcus@glaserweil.com, for Plaintiffs PROCURENET LIMITED and GURBAKSH CHAHAL (via Personal Appearance)
Jonathan Patchen, Esq., Yuhan Chi, Esq., Willkle Farr & Gallagher LLP, 415-856-7400 for Defendants Twitter, Inc., and X Corp., (via ZOOM)
Sheila Pham, CSR# 13293, 415-517-5439, spham28@yahoo.com, Court reporter, (via ZOOM)

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS TWITTER, INC. and X CORP.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT

Defendants' (X Corp. successor in interest to Twitter, Inc.) special motion to strike is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR# 13293, 415-517-5439, spham28@yahoo.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

*AFTER HEARING, AN ORDER DENYING DENYING DEFENDANTS' SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE IS SIGNED***
